notes: All scores are gameplay-tuned. REALISTIC mode enforces biological plausibility. SANDBOX mode allows all pairings with instability penalties applied.

compatibilityGroups.description: Define which groups can pair. Used by both modes. Distance determines penalty severity.

pairingTiers.description: Tier determines base compatibility score, fertility penalty, sterile offspring chance, and hybrid instability. Lower tier = more distant pairing.

tiers.label: Same Genus (Different Species)
tiers.condition: same genus, different species (e.g. Canis lupus x Canis latrans)
tiers.notes: Coywolf, coydogs, wolfdogs are established natural/documented hybrids.

tiers.label: Same Tribe, Different Genus
tiers.condition: same tribe (Canini or Vulpini), different genus
tiers.notes: No documented natural hybrids. Sandbox-only. High instability. Offspring unlikely to reproduce.

tiers.label: Same Subfamily (Caninae), Different Tribe
tiers.condition: same subfamily Caninae, different tribe (Canini x Vulpini)
tiers.notes: Biologically implausible. Purely sandbox fantasy. Heavy instability and near-zero fertility on offspring.

tiers.label: Extinct Caninae x Extant Caninae
tiers.condition: one parent is extinct Caninae species (e.g. Aenocyon dirus)
tiers.notes: Requires DNA reconstruction research. Instability and fertility improve as dna_completeness approaches 1.0.

tiers.label: Borophaginae x Any (Deepest Extinct Cross)
tiers.notes: Subfamilies diverged ~10 Mya. Maximum instability. Offspring are highly mutable and almost always sterile without advanced genetic stabilization research.

fertilityPenaltyRules.description: Stacking penalties applied to base fertility. Multiplicative.

penalties.note: gameplay-tuned; realistic breeding requires compatible body sizes

mutationRules.description: Random trait mutations per offspring. Chance scales with genetic instability.

mutationTypes.description: Random shift in coat color allele
Body size deviates ±15% from expected blend
Single categorical trait flips to unexpected option
One numeric stat shifts ±0.15 from expected
Unusual coat pattern appears from suppressed alleles
Rare morphological anomaly — visual only, health neutral unless compounded

numericTraits.variance: Normal(mean=0, stddev=0.08) clipped to trait min/max
numericTraits.polygenicNote: Polygenic traits use blending. Non-polygenic numeric traits use same formula with reduced variance (stddev=0.03).

categoricalTraits.logic: Each parent contributes one allele. Dominant expressed if present. Both recessive = recessive phenotype. Codominance possible for coat color.
categoricalTraits.blendingCategorical: For traits marked inheritanceMode=blending_categorical, offspring may express intermediate or novel category.

booleanTraits.logic: Treat True as dominant allele, False as recessive. Heterozygote expresses dominant.

computedTraits.logic: Computed at breed-time from pedigree and pairing tier. Not inherited directly.

hybridNamingRules.description: Rules for naming hybrid lineages in the game.

rules.format: portmanteau or common hybrid name (e.g. Coywolf, Wolfdog, Coydog)

rules.note: Prefix retained until lineage stabilizes above stability threshold 0.60 for 3 generations
Player may rename once lineage achieves fertility >= 0.50
Player may rename once lineage achieves stability >= 0.50

extinctDNAReconstructionRules.description: Mechanic for unlocking extinct species as breeding participants.

stages.label: Fossil Record Only
stages.notes: Species exists in compendium as reference only. Can be studied for kennel lore XP.

stages.label: Partial Genome
stages.notes: Trait data partially populated. Not yet viable for reproduction. Unlock via research missions.

stages.label: Draft Reconstruction
stages.notes: First experimental pairings allowed (sandbox only). High instability and low fertility expected.

stages.label: Advanced Reconstruction
stages.notes: Improved offspring viability. Revival lineage naming unlocks.

stages.label: Full Revival
stages.notes: Near-complete genome. Offspring approach historical species baseline. Player may unlock de-extinction achievement.

researchMechanics.note: DNA completeness is per-species and persists across player save. Shared pool if future multiplayer is added.

realisticModeEnforcement.notes: Realistic mode mimics documented real-world hybridization. Only Canis intragroup crosses (wolf x dog x coyote x jackal) are freely permitted.

sandboxModeRules.playerNotification: Sandbox mode: all pairings are theoretical. Instability and fertility penalties still apply. Offspring may be highly mutable.
sandboxModeRules.notes: Sandbox is the primary mode for player experimentation and lineage building. No biological restrictions enforced.
